payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table with ornate carved legs and decorative molding on a glossy rectangular top, positioned immediately behind a leather recliner; table appears small, warm brown in color, and approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
